title: Safe exercise during pregnancy
excerpt: Benefits, usually suitable activities, precautions, and stop signs — ACOG physical activity guidance summarized.
content:
## Benefits

May reduce back pain, improve mood and sleep, support healthy weight, and prepare for labor — if no contraindications.

## Usually suitable

Walking, swimming, stationary cycling, prenatal yoga, light strength with approval.

## Avoid or use caution

Contact sports, scuba diving, hot yoga, activities with fall risk, heavy abdominal strain. Modify as belly grows.

## Stop immediately if

Vaginal bleeding, fluid leak, painful contractions, chest pain, severe shortness of breath, dizziness, or calf swelling with pain.
